Class BudgetUI

java.lang.Object
UI.BudgetUI
public class BudgetUI extends Object
Handles the user interface for budget management.

US#4 seq:

  • displayBudgets() → [Displays Budget List]
  • [Normal Create] createBudget() → Budget.create()
  • [Category Conflict] Budget.checkThreshold() → showAlert()
  • [Success] Budget returns void → showProgressBar()
  • [Edit Existing] editBudget() → Budget.update() → void

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    BudgetUI(Scanner scanner, User currentUser)
    Constructs a new BudgetUI.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    checkThreshold(Budget budget)
    Checks the threshold for a specific budget directly.
    void
    createBudget()
    Prompts the user to create a new budget for a category.
    void
    createBudget(Category category, BigDecimal amount, String period, int alertThreshold)
    Programmatically creates a budget.
    void
    displayBudgets()
    Retrieves and displays all active budgets for the current user.
    void
    editBudget()
    Prompts the user to edit an existing budget's limit and threshold.
    void
    showAlert(String categoryName, BigDecimal spentAmount, BigDecimal budgetAmount)
    Displays a warning alert if a budget threshold is exceeded or if a conflict occurs.
    void
    showProgressBar(BigDecimal spentAmount, BigDecimal totalAmount)
    Renders an ASCII progress bar representing budget usage.
    void
    start()
    Starts the budget UI loop, displaying budgets and the menu.
    void
    update(Budget budget, BigDecimal newAmount, int newAlertThreshold)
    Programmatically updates a budget's limit and threshold.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • BudgetUI

      public BudgetUI(Scanner scanner, User currentUser)
      Constructs a new BudgetUI.
      Parameters:
      scanner - the scanner for console input
      currentUser - the currently logged-in user

  • Method Details

    • start

      public void start()
      Starts the budget UI loop, displaying budgets and the menu.

    • displayBudgets

      public void displayBudgets()
      Retrieves and displays all active budgets for the current user.

    • createBudget

      public void createBudget()
      Prompts the user to create a new budget for a category.

    • editBudget

      public void editBudget()
      Prompts the user to edit an existing budget's limit and threshold.

    • showAlert

      public void showAlert(String categoryName, BigDecimal spentAmount, BigDecimal budgetAmount)
      Displays a warning alert if a budget threshold is exceeded or if a conflict occurs.
      Parameters:
      categoryName - the budget category
      spentAmount - the amount currently spent
      budgetAmount - the total budget limit

    • showProgressBar

      public void showProgressBar(BigDecimal spentAmount, BigDecimal totalAmount)
      Renders an ASCII progress bar representing budget usage.
      Parameters:
      spentAmount - the amount spent so far
      totalAmount - the total limit allowed

    • checkThreshold

      public void checkThreshold(Budget budget)
      Checks the threshold for a specific budget directly.
      Parameters:
      budget - the budget to check

    • update

      public void update(Budget budget, BigDecimal newAmount, int newAlertThreshold)
      Programmatically updates a budget's limit and threshold.
      Parameters:
      budget - the budget to update
      newAmount - the new limit amount
      newAlertThreshold - the new alert threshold

    • createBudget

      public void createBudget(Category category, BigDecimal amount, String period, int alertThreshold)
      Programmatically creates a budget.
      Parameters:
      category - the category object
      amount - the limit amount
      period - the budget period
      alertThreshold - the alert threshold percentage
